title: RNA-Seq analysis to identify differentially expressed genes in top and bottom leaves under Alternaria brassicicola infection
author: Gangurde, Sunil
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The broccoli plants were infected with Alternaria brassicicola and RNA samples were extracted for control and inoculated plants at 10 days post inoculation.
steps_raw: The broccoli plants were infected with Alternaria brassicicola and RNA samples were extracted for control and inoculated plants at 10 days post inoculation.
